playerStats.title: Player stats

playerStats.noteEvents: From match events. Shots, pass accuracy and ratings appear when the provider supplies player-level data.

live.pageIntro: World Cup 2026 scores from confirmed results and live API sync. Finished group and knockout matches show full-time scores; live matches update every 10 seconds when the provider is active.
live.syncDegraded: Showing last known scores — live provider is temporarily limited.

empty.liveNow: No live matches right now. Live scores appear here when the tournament is underway and API sync is active.
empty.today: No World Cup matches scheduled for today in the local schedule.
empty.completed: No completed matches yet. Full-time results appear when matches finish.
